title: Cuneiform Tablet #0232: Old Akkadian Loan Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a loan contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a loan contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Akkadian period. Loan Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records loan contract matters typical of Old Akkadian period administrative or literary practice.
